titleStmt.title: SII 33.45: original edition by K. Munirathnam and T. S. Ravishankar
No. 45. (A.R. No. 151 of 1946.) Eṟṟabaḷḷa, Pulivendla Taluk, Cuddapah District.

summary.p: Brow of a cliff outside the Pañchaliṅga cave facing the west.
This is dated Śaka 1364, Dundubhi, Kārttika śu. 15, Krittika nakshatra corresponding to 1442 A.D., October 18, Thursday, f.d.t. °69.

Written in chaste Telugu prose, the inscription is eulogy in nature, while the gift portion is vague. It refers to Prauḍha Dēvarāya, son of Vijayarāya, whose feet were worshipped (by his feudatories and officers) and who was Dēvendra on earth. His subordinate, Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Timmabhūpa, [son of] Vallabhēndra of Ātrēya-gōtra and Sōma-kula, was described as having court which consisted of many wise men. He bears the title Erigolasurabāṇa. Then Pulivendla is stated to have been situated south of Śrīparvata. The Panchalingēśvara-kshētra is said to lie on the hill Chanukoṇḍa, on the river Pālēru and north of Guṇḍālaya.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu namastuṁga śiraścuṁbi caṁdracāmara cāravētrailokya nagarāraṁbha mūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē . śrīmadrājādhirāja rājaparamēśvara Aṣṭadigrā
ja manōbhayaṁkara śrī vīrapratāpa vijayarāya mahārāja kumāruṁḍaina prauḍhadēvēṁdruṁḍani (yōdi) bhūlōka dēvēṁdruṁḍu sakala rājāna kumāra makuṭa māṇikya marici yaṁ
jarī nīrājitāpāda pīṭhuṁḍu mahanīya vārūḍhuṁḍai kappaṁ yucuṁḍagānu tadīya kṛpā labdha vibhavuṁḍusōma kulaṁ bo
śrī manmahāmaṁḍalēśvara Erigōle suratrāṇa mahārāja caritana Aṁteṁbaragaṁḍa dhararaṇī biruduna prakhyātaṁbulagu vikrama sāhasaṁbulabhinava vikramādityuḍa naṁ vallabhēṁdra ratna
mahita bhūmaṁḍalā khaṁḍa nirmmalanija kīrticaṁdri kānaṁdita baṁdhu jana cakōra timmabhūpō kavi gamaki vādi vāgminaṁdi mahādhajana pārijātuṁḍa puliviṁdalastaḷaṁ
vidvajjana sametaṁdave viśada vidyākaḷā lanu vihāriṁpu cuṁḍaṁgānu sarvasusama saviḍaṁbagu śrī parvataṁbunaku dakṣiṇadigbhāgaṁbu muktidaśaṁbhunaṁ brasiddaṁbai puli viṁdalayanu puravaraṁbunaku dakṣiṇa pravēśaṁbunaṁ beraḍagunu
guṁḍālayanu mahātīrthaṁbunaku nuttarābhāgaṁbunaṁ paścima pravāhiniyaina pālēṭi tīraṁbunaṁ canukoṁḍa manu mahāparvataṁbunaku (mata)sapāśyaṁbuna parvata mahāguhāṁtarā vāsuṁḍai paṁcaliṁgēśvaruṁḍanu pēraṁbrasiddhuṁḍai sēsi
ruṁḍu siddhavidyādhara suranarakiṁ narayakṣarākṣasa garuḍa gaṁdharva gaṇa mahattuṁḍe . raṁbhō nā kavāravilāsinī vihita hṛdyavaibhavuṁḍaina Ade devu svasti śrī jayābhyudaya śakavarṣaṁbulu
vēyiṁni muṁnūṭa Aṟavadinālku duṁdubhi saṁvatsara kārtika śuddha paurṇami guruvāraṁ buna . (kṛttikā) nakṣatraṁbunāṁḍe . dānā (guṁḍa)nivāsaṁ beṟa gānu . nivusenanudinaṁbu niṁmmi migulane nariṁpu
cakri vaibhava sarvabhāvitavū tavaṁbuviriṁci taḥ karaṇabaṁ maṇiprabhāvaṁbunaṁ mitā pra cādyaṁbi kānanaṁ ta prapaṁnātma kalpa taru paṁcaka paṁcavī rasaṁtata
palasaṁ vitaraṇaṁ(vāṇī)vīkṣiṁpucuṁḍa caṁdrārkatāraku nu vikasukha bhūri yu(rā) rōgyasaubhāgyabhyāgya bhōgaprājya rājya(bhō)gōdaya brakahitavaibhavaṁ Ātrēya gōtrapavitra tiṁmma bhūpasa vijayībhava vina
yībhava vijayībhava . sēvānamra surāsurēṁdra makuṭamāṇikya nirājat(vāri) pīṭha vilasatpada dvaṁ bhāsura . Atibhūyāttava
varṇituṁ pacaliṁgēśvara . maṁgaḷa mahā śrī śrī śrī
Digital edition of SII 33.45 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
